creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
On Feb 20, 2007, at 12:10 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of security/swatch,
>
> Please note that PR ports/109370 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109370


Ralf indicates that he's being using the updated version of swatch  
with the patches.  Good enough for me, please go ahead an commit these.


--
Joseph Scott
